prompt: Create a realistic vertical food photograph of a Japanese-style cream soda topped with mitarashi dango. The scene shows one tall clear parfait glass filled with vivid emerald-green melon soda, visible carbonation bubbles, and several large ice cubes, set on a polished wooden café table. On top of the soda is one round scoop of pale vanilla ice cream leaning slightly left, beside one skewer of mitarashi dango leaning diagonally to the right; the skewer has exactly 5 glossy golden-brown rice dumplings coated in shiny caramel soy glaze, with a small wooden skewer tip visible above the top dumpling. Add one long matte black straw inserted behind the ice cream, leaning diagonally upward to the left. Place the glass on a small round silver saucer with a delicate rim, and put one slim metal spoon resting across the saucer in the foreground. Background: softly blurred warm café interior beside a window, natural daylight from the left, a small clear glass vase with water and delicate green stems and tiny pale flowers on the left side, and a blurred wooden chair on the right. Use shallow depth of field, soft bokeh, appetizing highlights on the glaze and glass, realistic condensation, crisp focus on the dessert, warm natural color grading, no text, no people, no logo. Customize the drink as vivid emerald-green melon soda, the topping as mitarashi dango, the ice cream as vanilla, the setting as warm window-side wooden cafe table, and the lighting as soft natural daylight from the left.
